channel.title: mt.hopemusic
channel.description: Follow us to keep up with all the latest news from the Mt. Hope High School Music Department!

item.title: The Mt.Hope Vocal Ensemble just got superior for the RIMEA chora...
item.description: The Mt.Hope Vocal Ensemble just got superior for the RIMEA choral festival!!! So proud of our hard work!

item.title: We are back at it for the @fourthofjulybristolri concerts this y...
item.description: We are back at it for the @fourthofjulybristolri concerts this year! Stop by at 5PM on June 26th for a great show!Set list is included in this post for convenience :)

item.title: Our Alumni Musicafe raised almost $500 for the MHHS Music Parent...
item.description: Our Alumni Musicafe raised almost $500 for the MHHS Music Parents Association! Many, many thanks to all our talented friends for coming back to our dingy old cafeteria. We will have much better pictures (and video) soon, but for now here are some screencaps!

item.title: Our first-ever Alumni Musicafe is tonight at 6:30PM in the Mt. H...
item.description: Our first-ever Alumni Musicafe is tonight at 6:30PM in the Mt. Hope cafeteria! Check out this wonderful article from the Warren Gazette:/warren/warren/warren/warren/warren/warren/warren/warren/warren/warren/warren/warren/warren/warren/stories/mhhs-welcomes-grads-back-for-inaugural-alumni-musicaf,140622

item.title: After almost ten years, and over forty shows, Musicafe has featu...
item.description: After almost ten years, and over forty shows, Musicafe has featured hundreds of performers, many of whom have since graduated and moved on to college, jobs, and families. While our former stars graciously support our current students by attending shows, they themselves have few opportunities to perform. For this reason, we are thrilled to announce our first ever Alumni Musicafe, to be held on June 11 at 6:30PM! Admission will be $10 per person ($5 for current students). All proceeds will benefit the Mt. Hope High School Music Parents Association.

item.title: Video for The Big Show was just posted. Use the Linktree in our ...
item.description: Video for The Big Show was just posted. Use the Linktree in our bio, or just head to the Mt. Hope Music channel on YouTube. Don’t forget to subscribe!

item.title: Mt. Hope Music would like to congratulate former Vocal Ensemble ...
item.description: Mt. Hope Music would like to congratulate former Vocal Ensemble member (and Tech Captain) Cristina Marino for being selected as this year's Miss 4th of July!

item.title: Please join us Thursday, May 21st at Senior Musicafe for one las...
item.description: Please join us Thursday, May 21st at Senior Musicafe for one last musical hurrah for the class of 2026. They will be missed more than they know. As always, refreshments are provided and donations are greatly appreciated.

item.title: Tomorrow is our 2026 spring concert! Please join us for some bea...
item.description: Tomorrow is our 2026 spring concert! Please join us for some beautiful songs performed by JIVE, Jazz Band, Vocal Ensemble, Chorus, Concert Band, and Symphonic Band!
